ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "title_brand_product_service" TEXT /* Title, brand, product, or service of the campaign */,
  "entrant_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entrant company */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location of the entrant company */,
  "idea_creation_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the idea creation company */,
  "idea_creation_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location of the idea creation company */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was last updated */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* The budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date the campaign started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date the campaign ended */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* The target audience for the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* The current status of the campaign (e.g., draft, submitted, shortlisted, won) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_entrant_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("entrant_company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_idea_creation_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("idea_creation_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_idea_creation_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("idea_creation_company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of the company (e.g., Entrant, Idea Creation) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* The website URL of the company */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* The physical address of the company */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* The contact phone number for the company */,
  "company_founding_year" INTEGER /* The year the company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state_province" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* The latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* The longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award category */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award category */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of the award (e.g., Grand Prix, Short List) */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award category */,
  "award_criteria" TEXT /* The criteria for winning the award */,
  "award_prize" TEXT /* The prize or recognition given to the winner */,
  "award_ceremony_date" TEXT /* The date of the award ceremony */,
  "award_ceremony_location" TEXT /* The location of the award ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_details" (
  "details_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of campaign details */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "creative_brief" TEXT /* Creative brief for the campaign */,
  "campaign_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the campaign */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign was submitted for the award */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* The strategy used in the campaign */,
  "key_metrics" TEXT /* The key performance metrics for the campaign */,
  "media_channels" TEXT /* The media channels used in the campaign */,
  "production_companies" TEXT /* The production companies involved in the campaign */,
  "campaign_url" TEXT /* The URL of the campaign website or landing page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("details_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_details_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., judge, organizer, admin) */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* The contact phone number for the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* The position or role of the user within their organization */,
  "user_company_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the company the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_campaigns" (
  "user_campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-campaign association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "role_in_campaign" TEXT /* Role of the user in the campaign (e.g., creator, reviewer) */,
  "user_company_role" TEXT /* The role of the user within their company */,
  "user_campaign_role_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the user's role in the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_campaigns_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_campaigns_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, JPG, MP4) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_caption" TEXT /* A caption or description for the file */,
  "file_author" TEXT /* The author or uploader of the file */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* The version number of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_files_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_parent_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the parent comment, if this is a reply */,
  "comment_visibility" TEXT /* The visibility of the comment (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_comments_comment_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_parent_id") REFERENCES campaign_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_comments_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Score given to the campaign (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or feedback provided with the rating */,
  "rating_criteria_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the criteria used for the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_ratings_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., submitted, shortlisted, won) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the change in status */,
  "status_updated_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_status_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_status_status_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("status_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
